parameters.query: SELECT s.id, s.symbol, s.direction, s.signal_data, s.chain, w.token_address, w.quote_token_address, t.decimals, t.liquidity_usd FROM signals s LEFT JOIN watchlist w ON w.symbol = s.symbol AND w.chain = 'solana' LEFT JOIN dex_tokens t ON t.address = w.token_address WHERE s.id = $1 AND s.status = 'approved' AND s.chain = 'solana'
SELECT usdc_balance, available_usdc, total_value_usdt, consecutive_losses, system_active FROM dex_portfolio WHERE id = 1

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ quoteResponse: $json.quote_response, userPublicKey: 'SIGNER_PUBKEY_PLACEHOLDER', wrapAndUnwrapSol: true, dynamicComputeUnitLimit: true, prioritizationFeeLamports: 'auto' }) }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO trades (signal_id, symbol, direction, side, exchange, status, position_size_usdt, entry_price, stop_loss_price, take_profit_price, chain, dex, token_address, tx_signature, chain_data) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, 'buy', 'jupiter', 'open', $4, $5, $6, $7, 'solana', 'jupiter', $8, $9, $10::jsonb) RETURNING id

additionalFields.queryReplacement: ={{ [$json.signal_id, $json.symbol, $json.direction, $json.position_usdt, $json.entry_price, $json.stop_loss, $json.take_profit, $json.token_address, $json.tx_signature, JSON.stringify({ slippage_bps: $json.slippage_bps, price_impact_pct: $json.price_impact_pct, output_tokens: $json.output_tokens, route_plan: $json.route_plan, decimals: $json.decimals })] }}

parameters.query: UPDATE dex_portfolio SET available_usdc = available_usdc - $1, locked_in_positions = locked_in_positions + $1, total_trades = total_trades + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = 1

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ chat_id: $env.TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID, text: $json.text, parse_mode: $json.parse_mode, disable_web_page_preview: true }) }}

parameters.query: UPDATE signals SET status = 'failed', signal_data = signal_data || jsonb_build_object('exec_error', $2::text) WHERE id = $1

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ chat_id: $env.TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID, text: $('Build Error Message').first().json.text, parse_mode: 'Markdown' }) }}
